project(DocScanner)
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.9.0)

set (PACKAGE_NAME DocScanner)
set (CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE ON)
set (CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)

add_library(${PACKAGE_NAME} SHARED
        src/main/cpp/cpp-adapter.cpp
)

# Generated by `pnpm --filter react-native-doc-scanner run specs` (tsc && nitrogen) —
# must be run at least once before this file resolves.
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../nitrogen/generated/android/DocScanner+autolinking.cmake)

include_directories(
        "src/main/cpp"
        "../cpp"
)

find_library(LOG_LIB log)
find_package(react-native-vision-camera REQUIRED)   # <-- for HybridFrameSpec (analyzeFrame's Frame param)

target_link_libraries(
        ${PACKAGE_NAME}
        ${LOG_LIB}
        android
        react-native-vision-camera::VisionCamera
)
